free_text: Detailed study and mean field interpretation of O-16+
C-12 elastic scattering at seven medium energies.
Data were received from S.SZilner and
data-section was replace to table data.
5*1 cm**2, placed 7.8 cm from the target.
The uncertainties were set to be fixed 10% of the
experimental cross section, for the four highest
energies, the statistical uncertainties for the data
at 75 and 62 MeV and both choices at 80-MeV.
.The error was reported by authors in table
